title: Bridge Essay: Psilocybin therapy increases cognitive and neural flexibility in patients with major depressive disorder.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nonordinary — psychedelic decoupling, ego dissolution, DMN disruption, altered states.
**Phase context:** Psychedelic decoupling — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states of consciousness.

**Psilocybin therapy increases cognitive and neural flexibility in patients with major depressive disorder.** — Transl Psychiatry (2021). DOI: 10.1038/s41398-021-01706-y. PMID: 34750350. Psilocybin has shown promise for the treatment of mood disorders, which are often accompanied by cognitive dysfunction including cognitive rigidity. Recent studies have proposed neuropsychoplastogenic effects as mechanisms underlying the enduring therapeutic effects of psilocybin.
